roasThreshold.label: Minimum ROAS Threshold
roasThreshold.description: Flag campaigns below this ROAS value

cpaMultiplier.label: CPA Target Multiplier
cpaMultiplier.description: Flag when CPA exceeds target × multiplier

minConversions.label: Minimum Conversions for Significance
minConversions.description: Warn if total conversions below this threshold

funnelDropoffThreshold.label: Funnel Drop-off Threshold
funnelDropoffThreshold.description: Flag funnel stages with this drop-off rate

pageSpeedThreshold.label: Page Load Time Threshold
pageSpeedThreshold.description: Warn if page load time exceeds this value

budgetImbalanceThreshold.label: Budget Imbalance Threshold
budgetImbalanceThreshold.description: Flag when one creative has >70% spend but <30% conversions

matchRateThreshold.label: Match Rate Threshold
matchRateThreshold.description: Flag customer match rates below this value

formulas.name: Average Order Value
formulas.description: Calculated as total revenue divided by number of purchases

formulas.name: Return on Ad Spend
formulas.description: Revenue generated per dollar spent on advertising

formulas.name: Cost Per Acquisition
formulas.description: Average cost to acquire one customer

formulas.name: Click-Through Rate
formulas.description: Percentage of impressions that resulted in clicks

formulas.name: Conversion Rate
formulas.description: Percentage of clicks that resulted in purchases

rules.title: Missing Conversions
rules.impact: High - May result in incorrect CPA calculations and underreported performance
rules.recommendedFix:
1. Check your conversion pixel installation
2. Verify purchase event is firing on thank-you page
3. Test with a test purchase
4. Check for ad blockers interfering with tracking

rules.title: Pixel/Server Event Mismatch
rules.description: Detects significant discrepancy between pixel and server events
rules.impact: Medium - May affect attribution accuracy and audience building
rules.recommendedFix:
1. Compare browser vs server event timestamps
2. Check for duplicate events
3. Verify event deduplication is implemented
4. Review server-side tracking setup

rules.title: Multiple Currencies Detected
rules.description: Detects mixed currencies in the dataset
rules.impact: Medium - May skew performance metrics if not normalized
rules.recommendedFix:
1. Standardize currency before importing
2. Apply exchange rates to normalize
3. Set a base currency for reporting
4. Use currency conversion API for real-time rates

rules.title: CPA Exceeds Target
rules.description: Flags campaigns where CPA exceeds target by multiplier
rules.impact: High - Overspending on acquisition, reducing profitability
rules.recommendedFix:
1. Pause or reduce budget on underperforming campaigns
2. Review audience targeting
3. Test new ad creatives
4. Optimize landing page conversion rate
5. Narrow targeting to higher-intent audiences

rules.title: Low ROAS Campaigns
rules.description: Flags campaigns with ROAS below threshold
rules.impact: Medium to High - Unprofitable spend reducing overall account performance
rules.recommendedFix:
1. Review creative fatigue - rotate ads
2. Test new audiences
3. Adjust bidding strategy
4. Check for seasonal factors
5. Consider pausing if no improvement after optimization

rules.title: Low Match Rate
rules.description: Detects low customer list match rates
rules.impact: Medium - Reduces effectiveness of audience targeting and lookalikes
rules.recommendedFix:
1. Verify Customer List ID formatting
2. Use more customer data points (email, phone, name)
3. Ensure proper hashing (SHA256)
4. Update customer lists more frequently

rules.title: Duplicate Transaction IDs
rules.description: Detects duplicate transaction IDs in the dataset
rules.recommendedFix:
1. Implement deduplication at data source
2. Use unique transaction IDs
3. Check for multiple pixel fires
4. Verify server-side tracking is not double-counting

rules.title: Missing UTM Parameters
rules.description: Detects rows missing UTM campaign parameters
rules.impact: Medium - Reduces ability to track campaign performance accurately
rules.recommendedFix:
1. Set up UTM tracking for all campaigns
2. Use UTM builder tools
3. Create UTM naming conventions
4. Configure auto-tagging where available

rules.title: High Checkout Drop-off
rules.description: Estimates high drop-off between checkout and purchase
rules.impact: Medium - Revenue loss from abandoned checkouts
rules.recommendedFix:
1. Simplify checkout process
2. Add guest checkout option
3. Display trust signals
4. Implement abandoned cart emails
5. Check for shipping cost shock

rules.title: Limited Sample Size
rules.description: Flags datasets with insufficient conversions for statistical significance
rules.impact: Low - Results may not be statistically significant
rules.recommendedFix:
1. Continue collecting data before making major decisions
2. Consider broader targeting to increase volume
3. Be cautious about scaling based on limited data
4. Use wider confidence intervals for analysis

rules.title: Imbalanced Budget Allocation
rules.description: Detects creatives with high spend share but low conversion share
rules.impact: Medium - Budget not optimized for best performers
rules.recommendedFix:
1. Reallocate budget to better-performing creatives
2. Test new creative variations
3. Use automated creative optimization
4. Review creative messaging

rules.title: Pixel Events Not Recording
rules.description: Detects purchases without corresponding pixel events
rules.impact: Critical - Platform cannot optimize for conversions
rules.recommendedFix:
1. Check pixel helper tool for errors
2. Verify pixel is installed on all pages
3. Check for JavaScript errors
4. Test with Facebook Events Manager
5. Consider implementing Conversions API

rules.title: Slow Page Load Times
rules.description: Detects landing pages with slow load times
rules.impact: Medium - Every second delay reduces conversions ~7%
rules.recommendedFix:
1. Optimize images (WebP format, compression)
2. Minimize JavaScript
3. Use CDN for static assets
4. Enable browser caching
5. Consider lazy loading
6. Use PageSpeed Insights for specific recommendations

rules.title: Ad Copy Policy Considerations
rules.description: Flags ads with potentially problematic content patterns
rules.impact: Low - Informational only, manual review recommended
rules.recommendedFix:
1. Review flagged ad copy manually
2. Ensure claims are substantiated
3. Avoid misleading urgency language
4. Check platform-specific ad policies
5. Consider A/B testing alternative copy

rules.title: Varying Attribution Windows
rules.description: Detects different attribution windows across campaigns
rules.impact: Low - May cause confusion when comparing campaign performance
rules.recommendedFix:
1. Standardize attribution window across campaigns
2. Document which window is used for each campaign type
3. Consider using platform default (7-day click, 1-day view)
